message:
feat(fcp-core): implement Trust/Quorum Model (1n78.25)

Add normative quorum policy and signature verification for FCP2:

- RiskTier enum: Safe, Risky, Dangerous, CriticalWrite
- QuorumPurpose enum: AuditHead, RevocationHead, ZoneCheckpoint, etc.
- required_quorum(n, f, risk_tier) function per spec
- QuorumPolicy struct with n/f configuration and degraded mode
- SignatureSet with canonical sorting by node_id
- DegradedModeState and DegradedModeReason types
- QuorumVerificationResult for verification outcomes
- Comprehensive tests (236 passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -27,4 +30,5 @@ tracing.workspace = true
